designSystem.style: Bold geometric dark-first design with glowing node maps, gradient accents, and constellation-inspired spatial UI

screenDetails.home: Novelty feed with trending sagas, AI Muse banner, story cards showing forks/contributors/chapters
screenDetails.explore: Enclave hubs browser with join/leave, weekly challenge banner, genre tags
screenDetails.forge: Create new saga or contribute to existing — title input, AI Muse suggestions, enclave selector, fork settings
screenDetails.map: Spatial narrative map SVG visualization of branching story paths with color-coded node types (main/fork/branch/leaf)
screenDetails.profile: User stats grid, AI Muse style profile bars, recent activity feed

features: Bottom tab navigation with forge CTA button
CSS keyframe animations (fadeIn, slideUp, floatUp, glow)
